patches.reason: Jira issue search with --agent returned only 'id' because 'summary' wasn't in the keep-fields map. Also added field promotion from nested 'fields' sub-object to flatten Jira issue responses.
patches.validated_outcome: keen find-issues --agent now returns key, summary, status for each issue.

patches.reason: Agents must re-export JIRA_CLOUD_PLATFORM_USERNAME/PASSWORD env vars in every shell invocation. Config file fallback eliminates this friction.
patches.validated_outcome: keen doctor passes when credentials are in ~/.config/keen/auth.json and env vars are unset.

deferred_to_upstream.feature: Generator should emit config paths matching the CLI binary name, not the internal project slug
deferred_to_upstream.reason: Default config path is ~/.config/jira-pp-cli-pp-cli/ which doesn't match the 'keen' binary name

patches.summary: Add find-issues, transition, sprints, get as top-level command aliases.
patches.reason: Most-used commands have 40-60 char paths (e.g. jira-cloud-platform-search and-reconsile-issues-using-jql-post). Aliases save agent tokens and reduce errors.
patches.validated_outcome: keen find-issues, keen transition, keen sprints, keen get all resolve correctly.

deferred_to_upstream.feature: Generator should support alias definitions in the spec or a sidecar config
deferred_to_upstream.reason: Aliases are per-CLI customizations that should survive regeneration without a local patch file
